Text.value: Vibration sensor, V2A housing, external thread, 10 .. 1000 Hz, velocity rms and acceleration rms and acceleration peak and temperature, 128 mm/s and 14 g (peak), IP67, M12 plug, 4-pin, default setting 01
Possibility to mark a device with function-specific information.
Possibility to mark a device with location-specific information.
Provides a unique instance identification compliant to DIN-SPEC 91406.

The parameter of the technology-specific application are set to default values. Identification parameter remain unchanged. An upload to the data storage of the master will be executed, if activated in the port configuration of the master.
The parameter of the device are set to factory default values and communication will be inhibited until the next power cycle. Note: Directly detach the device from the master port!
Shows the current velocity rms measurement value of measurement data channel 1.
Shows the multiplier for the velocity rms measurement value of measurement data channel 1 - 10exp(scale).
Indicates the current status of the velocity rms switching signal 1.1 for measurement data channel 1.
Indicates the current status of the velocity rms switching signal 1.2 for measurement data channel 1.
Shows the current acceleration rms measurement value of measurement data channel 2.
Shows the multiplier for the acceleration rms measurement value of measurement data channel 2 - 10exp(scale).
Indicates the current status of the acceleration rms switching signal 2.1 for measurement data channel 2.
Indicates the current status of the acceleration rms switching signal 2.2 for measurement data channel 2.
Shows the current acceleration peak measurement value of measurement data channel 3.
Shows the multiplier for the acceleration peak measurement value of measurement data channel 3 - 10exp(scale).
Indicates the current status of the acceleration peak switching signal 3.1 for measurement data channel 3.
Indicates the current status of the acceleration peak switching signal 3.2 for measurement data channel 3.
Shows the current temperature measurement value of measurement data channel 4.
Shows the multiplier for the temperature measurement value of measurement data channel 4 - 10exp(scale).
Indicates the current status of the temperature switching signal 4.1 for measurement data channel 4.
Indicates the current status of the temperature switching signal 4.2 for measurement data channel 4.
Indicates that at least one of the configured maintenance limits has been exceeded.
Defines the setpoint 1 value for the switching signal channel.
Defines the setpoint 2 value for the switching signal channel.
Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 1.1 vRMS.
Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 1.2 vRMS.
Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 2.1 aRMS.
Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 2.2 aRMS.
Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 3.1 aPeak.
Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 3.2 aPeak.
Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 4.1 Temperature.
Defines the setpoint values for switching signal channel 4.2 Temperature.
Defines the logical representation of the switching signal SSC in the process data.
Defines the evaluation mode for the switching signal SSC.
Defines the hysteresis at the switchpoint. A higher hysteresis may help to increase stability in critical applications.
Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 1.1 vRMS.
Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 1.2 vRMS.
Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 2.1 aRMS.
Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 2.2 aRMS.
Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 3.1 aPeak.
Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 3.2 aPeak.
Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 4.1 Temperature.
Defines the configuration parameter for switching signal channel 4.2 Temperature.
SSC1.1 Config Ext vRMS - Off Delay
Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the vRMS detection signal on the switching signal channel 1.1. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.
SSC1.2 Config Ext vRMS - Off Delay
Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the vRMS detection signal on the switching signal channel 1.2. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.
SSC2.1 Config Ext aRMS - Off Delay
Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the aRMS detection signal on the switching signal channel 2.1. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.
SSC2.2 Config Ext aRMS - Off Delay
Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the aRMS detection signal on the switching signal channel 2.2. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.
SSC3.1 Config Ext aPeak - Off Delay
Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the aPeak detection signal on the switching signal channel 3.1. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.
SSC3.2 Config Ext aPeak - Off Delay
Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the aPeak detection signal on the switching signal channel 3.2. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.
SSC4.1 Config Ext Temperature - Off Delay
Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the temperature detection signal on the switching signal channel 4.1. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.
SSC4.2 Config Ext Temperature - Off Delay
Defines the minimum duration of a stable inactive state of the temperature detection signal on the switching signal channel 4.2. Shorter inactive signals will be suppressed.
Eval Config - Signal Filter MDC1, MDC2
Defines the filter bandwidth for vibration signal evaluation. The filter is applied to MDC1 and MDC2 and has a 3rd order Butterworth characteristic. DIN ISO 10816/20816 requires 10 .. 1000 Hz.
Defines the function of the output signal at C/Q (pin 4) in SIO mode.
Defines the function of the output signal at I/Q (pin 2).
Defines the setpoint value for the maximum value at the analog output.
Defines the setpoint values for the minimum and maximum value at the analog output.
Defines the setpoint 1 value for the analog output. The lower value of SP1 and SP2 corresponds to the minimum analog output value, the higher value to the maximum analog output value.
Defines the setpoint 2 value for the analog output. The lower value of SP1 and SP2 corresponds to the minimum analog output value, the higher value to the maximum analog output value.
Defines which event sources can trigger events.
Enabled: An event is triggered if one of the maintenance alarms gets active.
Shows relevant key characteristics of the device for use in applications.
Shows the maximum measurement range for vibration measurements as specified.
Shows the maximum frequency range for vibration measurements as specified.
Shows the maximum specified supply current for the device excluding load.
Descriptor for the characteristic of the measurement data channel 1 (process data MV).
Descriptor for the characteristic of the measurement data channel 2 (process data MV).
Descriptor for the characteristic of the measurement data channel 3 (process data MV).
Descriptor for the characteristic of the measurement data channel 4 (process data MV).
Shows the lower value of measurement range.
Shows the upper value of measurement range.
Shows the unique code for the physical unit.
Shows the multiplier for measurement value - 10exp(scale).
Provides settings for configuration of vRMS maintenance monitoring.
Defines the threshold for triggering of vRMS maintenance monitoring.
Provides settings for configuration of aRMS maintenance monitoring.
Defines the threshold for triggering of aRMS maintenance monitoring.
Provides settings for configuration of aPeak maintenance monitoring.
Defines the threshold for triggering of aPeak maintenance monitoring.
Provides settings for configuration of temperature maintenance monitoring.
Defines the threshold for triggering of temperature maintenance monitoring.
Defines the limit for the accumulated operating time for a planned maintenance cycle in hours. The according maintenance alarm will be set, if this limit is exceeded.
Defines the limit for the number of transitions above the 'Overrun Threshold'. The according maintenance alarm will be set, if this limit is exceeded.
Defines the limit for the accumulated operating time in hours above the 'Overrun Threshold'. The according maintenance alarm will be set, if this limit is exceeded.
Shows the diagnosis status of the different maintenance evaluation channels.
Indicates if the configured maximum time for operation above the vRMS threshold has been exceeded.
Indicates if the configured maximum count for operation above the vRMS threshold has been exceeded.
Indicates if the configured maximum time for operation above the aRMS threshold has been exceeded.
Indicates if the configured maximum count for operation above the aRMS threshold has been exceeded.
Indicates if the configured maximum time for operation above the aPeak threshold has been exceeded.
Indicates if the configured maximum count for operation above the aPeak threshold has been exceeded.
Indicates if the configured maximum time for operation above the temperature threshold has been exceeded.
Indicates if the configured maximum count for operation above the temperature threshold has been exceeded.
Indicates if the configured operating time for a maintenance cycle has been exceeded.
The maintenance status and monitor data are reset.
The maintenance status and monitor data have been reset. A new maintenance monitoring ist started with the configured limits and thresholds.
Shows the accumulated monitor data since the last maintenance reset for the vRMS measurement channel.
Shows the accumulated monitor data since the last maintenance reset for the aRMS measurement channel.
Shows the accumulated monitor data since the last maintenance reset for the aPeak measurement channel.
Shows the accumulated monitor data since the last maintenance reset for the temperature measurement channel.
Shows the time in hours in powered operation since the last maintenance reset.
Shows the accumulated operating time in hours of operation above the configured threshold since the last maintenance reset.
Shows the number of transitions above the configured threshold since the last maintenance reset.
Shows the overall hours of operation since initial commissioning.
Indicates the operation at ambient temperatures close to or in excess of specification limits.
Contains parameters showing current and past conditions of temperature exposure since initial commissioning.
Shows the overall hours of powered operation above the specified temperature limit since initial commissioning.
Shows the number of transitions to operating temperatures above the specified limit in powered operation since initial commissioning.
Shows the maximum observed temperature in powered operation since initial commissioning.
Shows the minimum observed temperature in powered operation since initial commissioning.
Shows the currently observed operating temperature of the device.
Contains parameters showing current and past conditions of power cycles since initial commissioning.
Shows the number of power cycles since initial commissioning.
Shows the maximum observed powered operating time between power cycles in seconds since initial commissioning.
Shows the average observed powered operating time between power cycles in seconds since initial commissioning.
Shows the current operating time since the last power cycle in seconds.
Provides a set of relevant data suitable for observation purposes.
The limit for a configured maintenance cycle has been reached. Perform the required maintenance actions and apply the 'Maintenance Reset' command.
Ambient temperature outside specified temperature range
